description: Example: world/GAIA claim requires human review (require_review). The mandatory high-impact review gate fires even when all evidence requirements are met. Maps to Decision.ESCALATE in the canonical ABI.

reviewGate.description: World/GAIA claims with legal, security, or world-state impact require human review regardless of evidence strength.
reviewGate.reason: High-impact world-state changes require explicit human authorisation to prevent autonomous propagation of incorrect or harmful world models.

policyDecision.reason: Claim 'claim-gaia-review-001' is subject to review gate 'governed-intelligence/world-gaia-high-impact-review': High-impact world-state changes require explicit human authorisation to prevent autonomous propagation of incorrect or harmful world models.
policyDecision.remediation: Submit the claim for human review before admission. Record the human override with gate_id and reviewer identity.

note: admissionDecision='require_review' maps to decision='escalate' in the canonical sourceos.guardrail.decision.v0.1 ABI.
